title: Module 1
content:
Introduction to Smart Manufacturing: Definition and evolution of Smart
Manufacturing, Key components and principles, Comparison with traditional
manufacturing. Industry 4.0 and Digital Transformation: Overview of
Industry 4.0, Digitalization in manufacturing, Cyber-Physical Systems
(CPS), Internet of Things (IoT) in Manufacturing: IoT fundamentals and
architecture, IoT devices and sensors.

title: Module 2
content:
Data-Driven Manufacturing: Internet of Things (IoT) in Manufacturing
(contd.) Applications of IoT in manufacturing, Data Analytics and Big
Data in Manufacturing: Introduction to data analytics, Big Data in
manufacturing, Predictive analytics and maintenance, Artificial Intelligence
and Machine Learning: AI and ML basics, Applications of AI in
manufacturing, Case studies of AI-driven manufacturing.

title: Module 3
content:
Advanced Manufacturing Technologies: Robotics and Automation:
Robotics in manufacturing, Autonomous systems and collaborative robots,
Automation technologies, Additive Manufacturing and 3D Printing:
Principles of additive manufacturing, 3D printing technologies, Applications
in manufacturing.

title: Module 4
content:
Smart Manufacturing Systems and Integration: Integration of digital and
physical systems, Smart factories and digital twins. Case studies of
integrated systems, Cybersecurity in Smart Manufacturing: Cybersecurity
challenges in manufacturing, Protection strategies and best practices, Case
studies of cybersecurity breaches, Sustainability and Future Trends in
Smart Manufacturing: Sustainable manufacturing practices, Future trends.
